name: voicecraft
description: Zero-Shot Speech Editing and Text-to-Speech in the Wild

cut_off_sec.description: Only used for for zero-shot text-to-speech task. The first seconds of the original audio that are used for zero-shot text-to-speech. 3 sec of reference is generally enough for high quality voice cloning, but longer is generally better, try e.g. 3~6 sec
cut_off_sec.title: Cut Off Sec

kvcache.description: Set to 0 to use less VRAM, but with slower inference
kvcache.title: kvcache

left_margin.description: Margin to the left of the editing segment
left_margin.title: Left Margin

orig_transcript.description: Optionally provide the transcript of the input audio. Leave it blank to use the WhisperX model below to generate the transcript. Inaccurate transcription may lead to error TTS or speech editing
orig_transcript.title: Orig Transcript

right_margin.description: Margin to the right of the editing segment
right_margin.title: Right Margin

sample_batch_size.description: Default value for TTS is 4, and 1 for speech editing. The higher the number, the faster the output will be. Under the hood, the model will generate this many samples and choose the shortest one
sample_batch_size.title: Sample Batch Size

seed.description: Random seed. Leave blank to randomize the seed
seed.title: Seed

stop_repetition.description: Default value for TTS is 3, and -1 for speech editing. -1 means do not adjust prob of silence tokens. if there are long silence or unnaturally stretched words, increase sample_batch_size to 2, 3 or even 4
stop_repetition.title: Stop Repetition

target_transcript.description: Transcript of the target audio file
target_transcript.title: Target Transcript

temperature.description: Adjusts randomness of outputs, greater than 1 is random and 0 is deterministic. Do not recommend to change
temperature.title: Temperature

top_p.description: Default value for TTS is 0.9, and 0.8 for speech editing
top_p.title: Top P

whisperx_model.description: If orig_transcript is not provided above, choose a WhisperX model for generating the transcript. Inaccurate transcription may lead to error TTS or speech editing. You can modify the generated transcript and provide it directly to orig_transcript above
whisperx_model.title: whisperx_model
